title: zabelia triflora var. parvifolia
intro: Zabelia triflora var. parvifolia, also known as Korean lilac or Korean boxwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caprifoliaceae. Traditionally used in East Asian medicine, this plant has been found to possess medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Zabelia triflora var. parvifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, it is often used to make tea or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
